name: No Bake Caramel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and milk.
2. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Add pudding mix and oats.
4. Remove from heat and stir until well combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a cookie sheet or waxed paper.
6. Allow to cool for 15 minutes before eating.
